verses.latin_vulgate: Respondens autem Eliphaz Themanites, dixit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּעַן אֱלִיפַ֥ז הַֽתֵּמָנִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.king_james: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said,

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid Deo potest comparari homo,  etiam cum perfectæ fuerit scientiæ ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַלְאֵ֥ל יִסְכׇּן־גָּ֑בֶר כִּֽי־יִסְכֹּ֖ן עָלֵ֣ימוֹ מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: Can a man be profitable unto God, as he that is wise may be profitable unto himself?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid prodest Deo, si justus fueris ?  aut quid ei confers, si immaculata fuerit via tua ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֵ֣פֶץ לְ֭שַׁדַּי כִּ֣י תִצְדָּ֑ק וְאִם־בֶּ֝֗צַע כִּֽי־תַתֵּ֥ם דְּרָכֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty, that thou art righteous? or is it gain to him, that thou makest thy ways perfect?

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid timens arguet te,  et veniet tecum in judicium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲֽ֭מִיִּרְאָ֣תְךָ יֹכִיחֶ֑ךָ יָב֥וֹא עִ֝מְּךָ֗ בַּמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: Will he reprove thee for fear of thee? will he enter with thee into judgment?

verses.latin_vulgate: et non propter malitiam tuam plurimam,  et infinitas iniquitates tuas ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֣א רָעָתְךָ֣ רַבָּ֑ה וְאֵֽין־קֵ֝֗ץ לַעֲוֺנֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Is not thy wickedness great? and thine iniquities infinite?

verses.latin_vulgate: Abstulisti enim pignus fratrum tuorum sine causa,  et nudos spoliasti vestibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־תַחְבֹּ֣ל אַחֶ֣יךָ חִנָּ֑ם וּבִגְדֵ֖י עֲרוּמִּ֣ים תַּפְשִֽׁיט׃
verses.king_james: For thou hast taken a pledge from thy brother for nought, and stripped the naked of their clothing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aquam lasso non dedisti,  et esurienti subtraxisti panem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־מַ֭יִם עָיֵ֣ף תַּשְׁקֶ֑ה וּ֝מֵרָעֵ֗ב תִּֽמְנַֽע־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast not given water to the weary to drink, and thou hast withholden bread from the hungry.

verses.latin_vulgate: In fortitudine brachii tui possidebas terram,  et potentissimus obtinebas eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֣ישׁ זְ֭רוֹעַ ל֣וֹ הָאָ֑רֶץ וּנְשׂ֥וּא פָ֝נִ֗ים יֵ֣שֶׁב בָּֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: But as for the mighty man, he had the earth; and the honourable man dwelt in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viduas dimisisti vacuas,  et lacertos pupillorum comminuisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֭לְמָנוֹת שִׁלַּ֣חְתָּ רֵיקָ֑ם וּזְרֹע֖וֹת יְתֹמִ֣ים יְדֻכָּֽא׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast sent widows away empty, and the arms of the fatherless have been broken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea circumdatus es laqueis,  et conturbat te formido subita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֭ן סְבִיבוֹתֶ֣יךָ פַחִ֑ים וִ֝יבַהֶלְךָ֗ פַּ֣חַד פִּתְאֹֽם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore snares are round about thee, and sudden fear troubleth thee;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et putabas te tenebras non visurum,  et impetu aquarum inundantium non oppressum iri ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹ־חֹ֥שֶׁךְ לֹֽא־תִרְאֶ֑ה וְֽשִׁפְעַת־מַ֥יִם תְּכַסֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.king_james: Or darkness, that thou canst not see; and abundance of waters cover thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: an non cogitas quod Deus excelsior cælo sit,  et super stellarum verticem sublimetur ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲֽלֹא־אֱ֭לוֹהַּ גֹּ֣בַהּ שָׁמָ֑יִם וּרְאֵ֤ה רֹ֖אשׁ כּוֹכָבִ֣ים כִּי־רָֽמּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Is not God in the height of heaven? and behold the height of the stars, how high they are!

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dicis : Quid enim novit Deus ?  et quasi per caliginem judicat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽ֭אָמַרְתָּ מַה־יָּ֣דַֽע אֵ֑ל הַבְעַ֖ד עֲרָפֶ֣ל יִשְׁפּֽוֹט׃
verses.king_james: And thou sayest, How doth God know? can he judge through the dark cloud?

verses.latin_vulgate: Nubes latibulum ejus, nec nostra considerat,  et circa cardines cæli perambulat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָבִ֣ים סֵֽתֶר־ל֭וֹ וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֶ֑ה וְח֥וּג שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם יִתְהַלָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thick clouds are a covering to him, that he seeth not; and he walketh in the circuit of heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid semitam sæculorum custodire cupis,  quam calcaverunt viri iniqui,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֹ֣רַח עוֹלָ֣ם תִּשְׁמ֑וֹר אֲשֶׁ֖ר דָּרְכ֣וּ מְתֵי־אָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: Hast thou marked the old way which wicked men have trodden?

verses.latin_vulgate: qui sublati sunt ante tempus suum,  et fluvius subvertit fundamentum eorum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶֽׁר־קֻמְּט֥וּ וְלֹא־עֵ֑ת נָ֝הָ֗ר יוּצַ֥ק יְסוֹדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Which were cut down out of time, whose foundation was overflown with a flood:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dicebant Deo : Recede a nobis :  et quasi nihil posset facere Omnipotens, æstimabant eum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֹמְרִ֣ים לָ֭אֵל ס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וּמַה־יִּפְעַ֖ל שַׁדַּ֣י לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Which said unto God, Depart from us: and what can the Almighty do for them?

verses.latin_vulgate: cum ille implesset domos eorum bonis :  quorum sententia procul sit a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְה֤וּא מִלֵּ֣א בָתֵּיהֶ֣ם ט֑וֹב וַעֲצַ֥ת רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים רָ֣חֲקָה מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.king_james: Yet he filled their houses with good things: but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videbunt justi, et lætabuntur,  et innocens subsannabit eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְא֣וּ צַדִּיקִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ וְ֝נָקִ֗י יִלְעַג־לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The righteous see it, and are glad: and the innocent laugh them to scorn.

verses.latin_vulgate: nonne succisa est erectio eorum ?  et reliquias eorum devoravit ignis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־לֹ֣א נִכְחַ֣ד קִימָ֑נוּ וְ֝יִתְרָ֗ם אָ֣כְלָה אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Whereas our substance is not cut down, but the remnant of them the fire consumeth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Acquiesce igitur ei, et habeto pacem,  et per hæc habebis fructus optimos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַסְכֶּן־נָ֣א עִמּ֣וֹ וּשְׁלָ֑ם בָּ֝הֶ֗ם תְּֽבוֹאַתְךָ֥ טוֹבָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Acquaint now thyself with him, and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscipe ex ore illius legem,  et pone sermones ejus in corde tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַח־נָ֣א מִפִּ֣יו תּוֹרָ֑ה וְשִׂ֥ים אֲ֝מָרָ֗יו בִּלְבָבֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Receive, I pray thee, the law from his mouth, and lay up his words in thine heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si reversus fueris ad Omnipotentem, ædificaberis,  et longe facies iniquitatem a tabernaculo tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־תָּשׁ֣וּב עַד־שַׁ֭דַּי תִּבָּנֶ֑ה תַּֽרְחִ֥יק עַ֝וְלָ֗ה מֵאׇהֳלֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: If thou return to the Almighty, thou shalt be built up, thou shalt put away iniquity far from thy tabernacles.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dabit pro terra silicem,  et pro silice torrentes aureos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁית־עַל־עָפָ֥ר בָּ֑צֶר וּכְצ֖וּר נְחָלִ֣ים אוֹפִֽיר׃
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou lay up gold as dust, and the gold of Ophir as the stones of the brooks.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eritque Omnipotens contra hostes tuos,  et argentum coacervabitur tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה שַׁדַּ֣י בְּצָרֶ֑יךָ וְכֶ֖סֶף תּוֹעָפ֣וֹת לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, the Almighty shall be thy defence, and thou shalt have plenty of silver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc super Omnipotentem deliciis afflues,  et elevabis ad Deum faciem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־אָ֭ז עַל־שַׁדַּ֣י תִּתְעַנָּ֑ג וְתִשָּׂ֖א אֶל־אֱל֣וֹהַּ פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: For then shalt thou have thy delight in the Almighty, and shalt lift up thy face unto God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rogabis eum, et exaudiet te,  et vota tua reddes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּעְתִּ֣יר אֵ֭לָיו וְיִשְׁמָעֶ֑ךָּ וּנְדָרֶ֥יךָ תְשַׁלֵּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt make thy prayer unto him, and he shall hear thee, and thou shalt pay thy vows.

verses.latin_vulgate: Decernes rem, et veniet tibi,  et in viis tuis splendebit lumen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽתִגְזַר־אֹ֭מֶר וְיָ֣קׇם־לָ֑ךְ וְעַל־דְּ֝רָכֶ֗יךָ נָ֣גַהּ אֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt also decree a thing, and it shall be established unto thee: and the light shall shine upon thy ways.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui enim humiliatus fuerit, erit in gloria,  et qui inclinaverit oculos, ipse salvabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִ֭שְׁפִּילוּ וַתֹּ֣אמֶר גֵּוָ֑ה וְשַׁ֖ח עֵינַ֣יִם יוֹשִֽׁעַ׃
verses.king_james: When men are cast down, then thou shalt say, There is lifting up; and he shall save the humble person.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salvabitur innocens :  salvabitur autem in munditia manuum suarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְמַלֵּ֥ט אִֽי־נָקִ֑י וְ֝נִמְלַ֗ט בְּבֹ֣ר כַּפֶּֽיךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: He shall deliver the island of the innocent: and it is delivered by the pureness of thine hands.
